body:
I needed to rework the operator boundary condition logic to get the Jacobian stencil computation to work on GPUs.

Fixes #1173

title: Update and fix Aqua test
Add distributed cuda space construction test

body:
This PR:
 - moves all of the unit tests into buildkite.
 - Deletes the `test/gpu/device.jl` file, since it's from a deprecated module
 - Moves `test/gpu/data.jl → test/DataLayouts/cuda.jl`
 - Attempts to improve the grouping and labeling of the tests in the buildkite pipeline

I've also incorporated #1319.

This is a pretty big step towards #837. Making bors not depend on GHA would effectively close the issue.
title: Run all unit tests in buildkite

body:
This PR:
 - Extends and improves RecursiveApply (incorporates some changes/functionality in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1326) by working with Tuples/NamedTuples in a type-stable way
 - Adds RecursiveApply tests
 - Fix DSS inference and corresponding test
title: Extend and improve RecursiveApply, fix DSS inference
